generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular velocity and position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder measuring gearwheel position and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current (I_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensors measuring system position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance PositionSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensors
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) of the motor from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance GearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) of the gearwheel from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the motor from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel
]

instance GearwheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the gearwheel from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data derived from current sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management and interoperability"
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical system to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualizing friction data and system status"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDataVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters updated based on real-time data to improve motion accuracy"
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into physical relationships for maintenance and control optimization"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enhancing motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized friction data for real-time monitoring and decision-making"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the robot's first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance PhysicalSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance DigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance representing the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment for the digital shadow of the robot axis"
    base:contains DigitalShadow
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; the digital shadow is a passive entity with one-way data flow only, as specified in Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization; sensor data streamed live and processed immediately for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural SysML models, Simulink-based simulation models, and live sensor data via MQTT into a unified dashboard for friction analysis and motion control enhancement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage (as operated), using live data from the robot during active operation for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated vs. measured data traces; traceability of data generation processes through processing components and models to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML for system modeling."
]
